title: Ponmeri Shiva Temple
tagline: Ponmeri Shiva Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Ponmeri Shiva Temple is a famous Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva in Vatakara, Kozhikode in Kerala, India.
overview.description: Ponmeri Shiva Temple is a famous Hindu temple dedicated to Lord Shiva in Vatakara, Kozhikode in Kerala, India. The temple is famous as it has a unique sub-temple dedicated to Lord Brahma, who is rarely worshipped at temples.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer
Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Villiappally
topPlaces.description: Villiappally is a census town in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. Villiappally is the headquarters of Villiappally Panchayath, which contains two villages, Memunda and Villiappally.

topPlaces.name: Karthikappalli
topPlaces.description: Karthikappalli is a small village in Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. The population was about 19,021 people according to the 2011 Census of India.

topPlaces.name: Memunda
topPlaces.description: Memunda is a village near Vatakara town in Kozhikode district of Kerala, south India. The Lokanarkavu Temple is located at Memunda.

topPlaces.name: Lokanarkavu Temple
topPlaces.description: Lokanarkavu Temple is an ancient Hindu temple dedicated to goddess Durga devi situated in Memunda, 4 km from Vatakara, in Kozhikode District, North Malabar region of Kerala state of south India. Lokanarkavu is a short form of Lokamalayarkavu which means lokam (world) made of mala (mountain), aaru (river) and kavu (grove).

topPlaces.name: Ayancheri
topPlaces.description: Ayancheri is a village in the Vadakara Taluk of Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. It has now become a small business hub among the nearest villages.

topPlaces.name: Katameri
topPlaces.description: Katameri (also spelled Kadameri) is a small village near Vatakara, Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. It is around 14 km east from Vatakara.

topPlaces.name: Chennamangalam Temple
topPlaces.description: Chennamangalam Temple is situated in Chorode Panchayat of Vatakara Taluka in Kozhikode District of Kerala, India.The main Pratishtha is Lord Ayyappa. However Lords Shiva, Ganesh, Vishnu and Annapurneshwari are also worshipped in this temple.

topPlaces.name: Edacheri
topPlaces.description: Edacheri is a small panchayath in the district of Kozhikode in the South Indian state of Kerala.

items.note: Villiappally is a census town in Kozhikode district in the Indian state of Kerala. Villiappally is the headquarters of Villiappally Panchayath, which contains two villages, Memunda and Villiappally.

Lokanarkavu is a short form of Lokamalayarkavu which means lokam (world) made of mala (mountain), aaru (river) and kavu (grove).
Ayancheri is a village in the Vadakara Taluk of Kozhikode district in the state of Kerala, India. It has now become a small business hub among the nearest villages.
Katameri (also spelled Kadameri) is a small village near Vatakara, Kozhikode district in Kerala, India. It is around 14 km east from Vatakara.

Chennamangalam Temple is situated in Chorode Panchayat of Vatakara Taluka in Kozhikode District of Kerala, India.The main Pratishtha is Lord Ayyappa. However Lords Shiva, Ganesh, Vishnu and Annapurneshwari are also worshipped in this temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Ponmeri Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Ponmeri Shiva Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Ponmeri Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (66 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (134 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Ponmeri Shiva Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Ponmeri Shiva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Ponmeri Shiva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Ponmeri Shiva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Ponmeri Shiva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Villiappally, Karthikappalli, Memunda, Lokanarkavu Temple, Ayancheri.
